heading: Expenditures
label: 287d Expenditures
text: In accordance with policies and procedures approved by the Speaker, the Parliamentarian may make such expenditures as may be necessary or appropriate for the functioning of the Office.
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 5 of House Resolution No. 502, Ninety-fifth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Apr. 20, 1977Pub. L. 95–94
